event: Portrait of Pope Pius VII seated in a chair
description: A formal seated portrait of an elderly man in papal vestments — a white cassock beneath a red velvet mozzetta trimmed with white ermine. He wears a white zucchetto on his head. He sits in a large wooden chair with his left hand resting on the arm and his right hand holding a document. His expression is serious and weary. A dark blue curtain with a golden finial hangs in the background. The painting is rendered with rich, warm tones and careful attention to the textures of fabric.

_meta.title: Portrait of Pope Pius VII (Barnaba Chiaramonti)
